Scared of wrong answers?

We understand your frustrations.
GPAI automatically cross-checks every output with TOP AI Engines so that you can be confident in your solutions.

TRUSTED BY STUDENTS WORLDWIDE

Students from Top Universities Use GPAI
Google Play Reviews
Loved by 200,000+ learners world wide.

S***h M.

What an amazing creation is this!!!! I mean I love this!!!! This has helped me a lot. Being a student I can happily say that this is the best AI tool I've ever used!!! Not only just it solves my problem but simplifies it...it helps me connect the dots clear up my doubts and strengthen my weak areas! it's diagram generating feature is amazing! I hope this tool will be free for the rest of my life...or may be not forever atleast for 2 years😭🙏💗🫶✨

Oct 24, 2025
Google Play

M*****l B.

I've been using the GPAI app for a while, and it honestly feels like a game-changer. It makes studying smoother, faster, and way more engaging. The problem-solving support is clear and accurate, helping me understand concepts without getting stuck. What surprised me most is how well it generates visual flashcards and learning graphics — unlimited, crisp, and genuinely helpful for memory. The interface feels friendly, and the workflow just… clicks.

Nov 1, 2025
Google Play

J*****a L.

I recently started using GPAI, and I must say it's an impressive and powerful AI tool. It provides fast, accurate, and intelligent results, and the interface feels clean and easy to use. The AI's responses are well-structured and often go deeper than most other tools I've tried — definitely a great choice for anyone interested in productivity, learning, or creative work. Now all problems are solved in this update

Oct 9, 2025
Google Play

D***d R.

I feel this is the best AI app ever to help with solving problems, giving accurate solutions 🎉. It gives exact solutions to problems clearly, explaining each step properly, and also it clears further doubts perfectly, if you couldn't understand any step in the solution. It even gives solutions to Advanced Physics problems accurately, and very clearly.

Oct 11, 2025
Google Play

E***y K.

This is very much useful in explaining the conceptual questions and can able to break down in simpler terms of explanation which helps in better understanding. This app is highly recommended for the competitive exams aspirants especially those who are self studying to understand the concepts easily instead surfing on net all day

Oct 11, 2025
Google Play

name: product
title: Product | GPAI - AI-Powered STEM Learning Platform | GPAI
text:
Pricing
Get Started
AI tools for STEM learning

GPAI provides specialized AI tools for solving problems, creating visualizations, and building study materials.

AI Solver

Problem Solving with Triple Cross-Check

•
Upload homework pages or PDFs - AI automatically detects individual problems
•
Three solution formats: Step-by-step, Humanized explanations, Handwritten style
•
Triple cross-check: Every answer verified by GPT-5, Gemini 2.5, and Deepseek R1
•
Real-time streaming with live progress updates
•
Automatic visualization generation for graphs and diagrams
•
Export solutions to PDF or DOCX
•
Share solutions with public links
AI Visualizer

Text to Diagrams and Charts

•
Generate diagrams from text descriptions
•
Interactive clarification forms for precise results
•
Multiple variants with automatic quality ranking
•
Support for anatomy, circuits, networks, graphs, and illustrations
•
Real-time streaming with live preview
•
Download as PNG or JPG
AI Cheatsheet Builder

Study Notes from Any Source

•
Upload textbooks, lectures, or papers - AI generates concise study sheets
•
Block-based editing system with drag-and-drop reordering
•
Version control with full edit history
•
Interactive chat to refine and expand content
•
Customizable formatting: zoom, line height, letter spacing
•
Export to PDF with print-ready layout
Ready to get started?

Choose the tool you need and start working.

Try AI Solver
Try AI Visualizer
Try Cheatsheet Builder
